question.title: the spring web isn't working student/register.html
question.body:
the problem is that try to get the register.html form the controllerbut I can't figuer it out? this is ThymeleafApplication.java code

package com.cydeo.spring10thymeleaf;

import org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication;
import org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.SpringBootApplication;

@SpringBootApplication
public class ThymeleafApplication {

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        SpringApplication.run(ThymeleafApplication.class, args);
    }

}

The controller.java code:

The webpage:

answers.body:
Do you have a WebMvcConfigurer class setup? This will let spring know where to find the view register.html

@Configuration
@EnableWebMvc // Enable Spring MVC
@ComponentScan("com.cydeo.controller") // Will scan com.cydeo.controller for @Controller classes
public class WebConfig implements WebMvcConfigurer
{
    private static final String TEMPLATE_PREFIX = "classpath:/WEB-INF/templates/";
    private static final String TEMPLATE_SUFFIX = ".html";

    /**
     * Thymeleaf View Resolver
     * Resolves Thymeleaf template views from logical view names
     *
     * @param templateEngine
     */
    @Bean
    public ViewResolver viewResolver(SpringTemplateEngine templateEngine)
    {
        ThymeleafViewResolver viewResolver = new ThymeleafViewResolver();
        viewResolver.setTemplateEngine(templateEngine);
        return viewResolver;
    }

    /**
     * Template Engine
     * Processes the templates and renders the results
     *
     * @param templateResolver
     */
    @Bean
    public SpringTemplateEngine templateEngine(SpringResourceTemplateResolver templateResolver)
    {
        SpringTemplateEngine templateEngine = new SpringTemplateEngine();
        templateEngine.setTemplateResolver(templateResolver);

        return templateEngine;
    }

    /**
     * Template Resolver
     * Loads the Thymeleaf templates
     *
     */
    @Bean
    public SpringResourceTemplateResolver templateResolver()
    {
        SpringResourceTemplateResolver templateResolver = new SpringResourceTemplateResolver();
        templateResolver.setPrefix(TEMPLATE_PREFIX);
        templateResolver.setSuffix(TEMPLATE_SUFFIX);
        templateResolver.setTemplateMode("HTML");
        return templateResolver;
    }
}

It seems odd that you are getting a 404, which is what that error message is, it would seem you either don't have the correct path for the request or the controller isn't registered correctly.

The student controller should work given the example code but something in the greater project isn't 100% correct.

A stripped-down working version I posed here.

I would start with making sure any controller was working before layering in the nesting but maybe this example will give you the place to start.
